title: Speed Timer
description: The best and most accurate in-game speedrun timer for Minecraft!
body:
The Perfect Timer For Minecraft Speedrunning!
- No Effort,
- No Setup,
- Automatic,
- Perfect For Speedrunning,
- Extremely Accurate down to the millisecond!

How To Use!
1. Drag and Drop the Datapack Into Your World
2. And you are done, as soon as you get into your world the timer will start automatically and
   stop as soon as you beat the game!




![The Speed Timer In Game, Showing Minutes, Seconds, and Milliseconds!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28ed285beb23d3f27dc8dabb7b533c2744346fb5.png)
